1.comment: Absolutely incredible sound! The noise cancellation is top notch, rivaling brands twice the price. Comfort is great for 4+ hours of work.
Very good sound quality, but the earcups are slightly small for my ears. The fast charging works exactly as advertised, saving me multiple times.

2.comment: Best smartwatch for the price! The AMOLED screen is super bright and crisp even in direct sunlight. Battery easily lasts 9 days.
Good tracking accuracy for running and swimming. The app takes a bit of time to sync occasionally, but overall, it's very reliable.

3.comment: This jacket is stunning. Smells like genuine leather, fits perfectly, and feels premium. Already received several compliments!

7.comment: I have been using this serum for 3 weeks and my dark spots are noticeably fading. It absorbed quickly and doesn't break me out.
Good Vitamin C serum. Slight tingling when applying first, but works well. I keep it in the fridge so it doesn't oxidize.
